title: monardella purpurea subsp. neglecta
intro: Monardella purpurea subsp. neglecta, also known as Purple Needlegrass Monardella, is a subspecies of the Monardella purpurea plant, a member of the mint family (Lamiaceae) native to the southwestern United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Monardella purpurea subsp. neglecta include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and potentially lowering blood pressure. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
